data.chapter_title_en: Words of remembrance for morning and evening
data.arabic_text: ((أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ)) (ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ إذا أمسى).
data.english_text: (I take refuge in Allah’s perfect words from the evil He has created.)(three times in the evening)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (aAAoothu bikalimatil-lahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.) (three times in the evening)
